name: Insightly
description:
What Insightly Does

Insightly is a strong bridge between sales and delivery. In many agencies, CRM and project management live in separate systems, which creates handoff gaps after a deal closes. Insightly brings those worlds together by combining CRM with built-in project management. When a deal is marked as won, it can be converted directly into a project with tasks, milestones, and owners already in place.

This makes Insightly a good fit for agencies that deliver complex, multi-phase work, such as a three-month website build followed by an ongoing SEO retainer, where clean transitions from sales to execution matter.

Source: Insightly

‚ÄãKey Features

  • ‚ÄãProject Management Integrated: Track tasks, milestones, and project pipelines right alongside your sales contacts.
  • ‚ÄãRelationship Mapping: See the ‚Äúweb‚Äù of connections between different contacts and companies.
  • ‚ÄãWorkflow Automation: Automate the ‚Äúhand-off‚Äù from the sales team to the account manager by creating up to 2,000 automated tasks per month on some plans.

‚ÄãBenefits of Insightly

  • ‚ÄãBetter Fulfillment: Projects do not get lost in transition after the contract is signed.
  • ‚ÄãUnified View: Everyone on the team (sales and ops) sees the same client history.
  • Built-In Accountability: Tasks, milestones, and owners are assigned easily when deals convert to projects.

‚ÄãPricing

The Insightly CRM is priced in the following tiers.

  • ‚ÄãPlus: $29/user/month
  • ‚ÄãProfessional: $49/user/month
  • Enterprise: $99/user/month

The All-in-One Insightly package includes CRM, marketing automation, app connect, and support and ticketing. It‚Äôs priced as follows:

  • ‚ÄãPlus: $349/month
  • ‚ÄãProfessional: $899/month
  • Enterprise: $2,599/month

‚ÄãPros

‚Äã‚úÖ Best CRM for agencies with complex, multi-step delivery processes.

‚úÖ Highly customizable to fit unique business flows.

‚ÄãCons

‚Äãüö´ The interface can feel a bit ‚Äúclunky‚Äù and dated compared to newer tools.

üö´ Requires more setup time than a simple Vcita-style tool.

‚Äç
what_people_say:
What Customers Say

‚ÄúWhat I like best about Insightly is how it combines CRM and project management in one platform, so you can track a customer from first lead all the way through delivery. It‚Äôs also very easy to use, with clean workflows and strong email and calendar integration.‚Äù

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

‚Äç
